ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol (e.g., AYE, AAPL) */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange (e.g., NYSE, NASDAQ) */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the company (e.g., Technology, Finance) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the company (e.g., Software, Banking) */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the stock information was last updated */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Initial Public Offering date of the company */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* Name of the CEO of the company */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the company's headquarters */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the company's official website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price data */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of shares traded */,
  "adjusted_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price (to account for splits and dividends) */,
  "pre_market_price" REAL /* Pre-market price of the stock */,
  "after_market_price" REAL /* After-market price of the stock */,
  "volume_weighted_average_price" REAL /* Volume-weighted average price (VWAP) for the day */,
  "change" REAL /* Change in price compared to the previous day */,
  "percent_change" REAL /* Percentage change in price compared to the previous day */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the price data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., investor, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended, deleted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the portfolio was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the portfolio was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the portfolio */,
  "initial_value" REAL /* Initial value of the portfolio */,
  "current_value" REAL /* Current value of the portfolio */,
  "status" TEXT /* Portfolio status (e.g., active, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_compositions" (
  "composition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio composition entry */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the stock in the portfolio (percentage) */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date the stock was added to the portfolio */,
  "shares" INTEGER /* Number of shares of the stock in the portfolio */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Purchase price of the stock */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the stock was purchased */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the portfolio composition (e.g., active, sold) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("composition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_compositions_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_compositions_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)
